words.clue: Scale measuring tissue density on CT scans, named after its inventor
Loss of a normal border on X-ray when adjacent structures share the same density
Insoluble contrast agent used to coat the GI mucosa for imaging studies
Imaging modality using magnetic fields and radiofrequency pulses with no ionising radiation
Radioactive glucose analogue (18F-labelled) used in PET scanning to detect metabolic activity
Technique combining endoscopy and fluoroscopy to image biliary and pancreatic ducts
Free gas in the peritoneal cavity visible as air under the diaphragm on erect X-ray
Contrast study of the urinary tract using intravenous iodine-based contrast (abbreviation)
